system.description:
Prerequisite: Sorcery skill

The character projects their magical power in an awe-inspiring manner. When making a reaction throw to impress or intimidate other people, the character throws with Advantage. On a "natural" throw of 12, the target is so impressed that they act as though they were enthralled (per the Enthrall spell) when in the sorcerer's presence; the Aura's effect ends within 1 hour, but the positive impression persists.
